name: Tae-Hyun Yoon // Beta x Alpha
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Having a crush on an alpha as a beta sucked. It was a hopeless crush that Tae-Hyun could only keep as a sad fantasy.

Or maybe not.. Waking up with that dream alpha of next to him was quite something. Let’s just hope you wouldn’t hate him after last night.

_____________________________

Sorry it took so long to finally give you guys the beta x alpha bot 😔

I’ll probably make another beta x alpha but more like an alt of my Eugene bot. I could’ve done that in first place… but I wanted to make a new bot instead of giving you guys alt all the time 🙁

I’m probably gonna post another bot today, but before that I beg for someone’s help rn 😞 how the freak do I put a gif banner in my description? I tried a few different ways and it keeps disappearing or just show up as a picture instead of a gif.. im gonna keep on trying today and otherwise I’ll have to make it just a picture 💔

I did not read this over again, so apologies if there are any mistakes
